extraction.notes: The module explicitly links Power Platform (model-driven apps) and Power BI as the technical stack for Sustainability Manager.

module_name: Optimize your business process with process advisor

skills.definition: Implement software robots to automate repetitive, rule-based digital tasks.
skills.evidence_quote: knowing which activities are most useful or simplest to automate ... recommends automation solutions

extraction.notes: Process Advisor is explicitly mapped to Process Mining and RPA recommendations; kept both as they represent distinct skill areas (analysis vs. implementation).

microsoft_surface_forms: Azure Monitor Syslog Data Collection Rule

skills.evidence_quote: you can install the Azure Monitor Linux Agent extension, and during that process you create an Azure Monitor Syslog Data Collection Rule

extraction.notes: Module is multi-disciplinary across SecOps/Sentinel and the Azure Arc/Monitor plumbing that enables ingestion; kept both layers.

module_name: Apply Networking concepts to Windows containers running on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) and AKS Hybrid

skills.definition: Package and run applications as containers, leveraging isolation and portability to deploy across environments.

module_name: Configure and deploy Teams Phone

skills.definition: Design and implement enterprise voice solutions using Microsoft Teams, integrating with PSTN via Calling Plans, Operator Connect, or Direct Routing.
skills.evidence_quote: Microsoft Calling Plans, Operator Connect, Direct Routing or Teams Phone Mobile PSTN connectivity must be configured before phone numbers can be assigned to users

skills.evidence_quote: Emergency calling locations are required to meet legal requirements in many countries/regions and must also be configured

skills.definition: Enable and manage PSTN dial-in capabilities for online meetings, allowing external participants to join via phone.

skills.definition: Manage licensing, phone number provisioning, and subscription assignments for communication services.

extraction.notes: Folded specific routing mechanisms (Direct Routing, Operator Connect) into the broader 'Unified Communications' skill as per guidelines, while keeping 'Microsoft Teams Administration' for the policy-level configuration.

module_name: Store local data with SQLite in a .NET MAUI app

skills.definition: Build cross-platform mobile and desktop applications using the .NET Multi-platform App UI framework.
skills.evidence_quote: .NET Multi-platform App UI (MAUI) allows you to cache data locally on the device on which the application is running

skills.definition: Design, build, and deploy applications for mobile devices, handling device-specific constraints and UX.

skills.definition: Implement embedded, serverless, zero-configuration, transactional SQL database engines for local data storage.

skills.definition: Manage lightweight, file-based databases that run within the same process as the application.
skills.evidence_quote: store data locally on a device for performance reasons

skills.definition: Implement strategies to store frequently accessed data locally to reduce latency and network calls.
skills.evidence_quote: A more efficiently designed app downloads the user data once and saves it locally to the device

extraction.notes: SQLite and Embedded Databases are kept distinct as SQLite is the specific technology while Embedded Databases is the architectural pattern; both are valid résumé skills.

module_name: Train and evaluate regression models

module_name: Explore device encryption features

skills.definition: Implement cryptographic protections for data at rest on devices and file systems to prevent unauthorized access.
skills.evidence_quote: Encryption provides an extra layer of protection against unauthorized access, when permissions alone are insufficient

microsoft_surface_forms: storage media is removed from the device
skills.definition: Secure endpoints against physical theft and unauthorized data access through hardware and software controls.

extraction.notes: BitLocker and TPM are specific implementations of the broader Data Encryption and Endpoint Security skills; included both as they are distinct technical competencies often listed separately on security-focused resumes.
